title: Native audio vs transcript-only task sketch
question: Which public-safe tasks make direct audio input clearly more useful than transcript-only input?
motivation: This is the first minimal test for the native-audio value idea.
decision: Draft task candidates before implementing anything.

title: Codec/tokenizer comparison table
question: Which codec properties appear most relevant to audio LLM usefulness and efficient inference?
motivation: This turns compression reading into a concrete map rather than a pile of papers.
decision: Start with public papers and avoid confidential internal comparisons.
